steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes a difference between Rafael Quiñones and James Catchings. From the notes: Quiñones played guitar, Catchings played cello — different instruments on different albums.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Rafael Quiñones and James Catchings have both lent their musical talents to albums by India Arie.: Emphasizes a similarity (both contributed), not a difference. ✗
  • Choice B — Both musicians have played on India Arie albums, but Rafael Quiñones played guitar, whereas James Catchings played cello.: Uses but and whereas to directly contrast their instruments. This is the key difference from the notes. ✓
  • Choice C — Rafael Quiñones played on India Arie's second studio album, Voyage to India, which was released one year after her album Acoustic Soul.: Mentions only Quiñones and focuses on album release timing, not the difference between the two musicians. ✗
  • Choice D — Acoustic Soul and Voyage to India, released in 2001 and 2002, respectively, are albums by singer and songwriter India Arie.: Neither musician is mentioned; the focus is on the albums. ✗
That is the correct answer.
